variants: Fariha Mazumdar is a dedicated civic leader, serving as the Groveway Heritage Trail Coordinator where she actively contributes to her community's well-being. Professionally, she works at Sable Mist Publishing, utilizing her expertise in the English language to enrich the literary field. Fariha holds a degree from Yeoman Crossroads College, which has been instrumental in her career development. Her literary works have been published in Tanglevine Pages, reflecting her commitment to writing. Balancing her professional and civic roles, Fariha exemplifies a deep dedication to both her craft and the community she serves.
